_comment: Random spontaneity events per Phase 10.1 DNA pass (HoMM/AoE DNA — reward attention with small surprises). 8 micro-events [PROPOSAL]. Triggered at wave-start / age-gate / low-lives with 25% probability, no two in a row, seeded by match-start for co-op determinism. None are match-winning; both boons and minor downsides exist to keep balance neutral. Co-op broadcast via additive snapshot message {type:'event-roll', id}. Off-switch at profile.settings.gameplay.spontaneity. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/events/*.tres).

events.copy: Scout's report extends the next-wave telegraph by 5 seconds.
Forge embers crackle — one random tower gets a free upgrade.
A veiled stranger reveals a hybrid adjacency hint.
An omen passes over the creeps — next wave has -10% HP.
The land is quiet — next wave has one fewer enemy.
The land is restless — next wave moves 5% faster.
The ancestors send a gift — +20 Knowledge.
